name: timmythetoaster
description: Timmy The Toaster isn't a fleeting hype coin or a quick fad. It's the culmination of our collective belief, narrative, and hard work—a long-term project designed to empower our community, spread joy and laughter, and help holders achieve true financial freedom. Many of you know me personally, and you've seen the dedication our team has poured in around the clock for this relaunch. We're rewarding our early believers because you've been with us from the start, and now it's time to soar sky-high as one united force. This is a 100% fair launch with no bundled supply, no insider trading, and absolute transparency. The liquidity pool will be created precisely at 11:00 PM Dubai Time, ensuring fairness for every participant. No rugs, no shortcuts—just pure potential backed by a robust growth plan.
